domain: Japanese wabi-sabi tea ceremony (Sen no Rikyū tradition; aesthetic of transience + imperfection; sabi = beauty through age/decay; raku tea-bowls intentionally embrace cracks/chips/glaze irregularity; bamboo scoops + weathered wood + moss-on-stone valued; controlled accumulation of patina signature)
specific_mechanism: WABI-PATINA: graceful-decay feedback-attenuation training schedule with timestamped per-sample loss weight + controlled imperfection samples. (1) Each training sample s_t carries an aging timestamp τ_t. (2) Loss weight w(s_t) = exp(-(now - τ_t) / T_patina) with category-specific half-life T_patina (short for stale-info, long for principled-skill). (3) Patina-attenuated SFT/RL replay buffer: old samples retained but signal weight gracefully decays. (4) Cracked-bowl reservoir: small fraction (5%) of intentionally noisy/erroneous samples preserved at FULL weight to maintain epistemic humility. (5) Patina schedule learned via validation-loss curvature signal (steeper curve → longer half-life).
llm_application: WABI-PATINA for continual-learning + SFT/RL post-training: timestamped per-sample loss-weight decay with per-category half-life + cracked-bowl epistemic-humility reservoir + curvature-tuned patina schedule. Differs from Mitigating Forgetting OpenReview YeErX16hMC (forgetting in sequential SFT + preference learning — not timestamped patina decay), WSO 2603.16127 (constant-LR no-decay — not per-sample timestamped attenuation), Unlearning That Lasts qZPIyCf5ke (irreversible forgetting — opposite of graceful attenuation), Continual RL Wolfe (adaptive forgetting — not timestamped patina). Differs from R417 VEPS-DECRESCENDO (close-harmony decrescendo), R376 QAJAQ-DAMPER (boat-paddle damping), R390 SAMI-YOIK (sami-singing fading), R439 INUIT-IPIIRIK (rare-marker logit suppression), R448 ULKANTUN (category-conditioned multi-rate context decay — closest, but per-token context-window decay not per-training-sample-timestamp) by EXPLICIT PER-SAMPLE TIMESTAMPED PATINA HALF-LIFE + CRACKED-BOWL EPISTEMIC-HUMILITY RESERVOIR.
novelty_claim: Mitigating Forgetting + WSO + Unlearning + Continual RL cover sample-level signal-attenuation forgetting paradigm. WABI-PATINA adds (a) per-sample aging-timestamped loss weight + (b) per-category half-life T_patina + (c) cracked-bowl 5% intentional-noise reservoir + (d) curvature-tuned schedule. Recombination — timestamped loss + replay buffers are mainstream.
